root_causes: Test fixtures for contract-impact and PR-autofix tests did not pin commit.gpgsign locally; host signing config leaked into temp git repos.
scripts/roadmap_realization_runner.py::_run_behavioral_tests resolved `pytest` via PATH, allowing a non-deterministic interpreter (lacking project deps) to evaluate behavioral proofs.
The authority-leak-local test failure was not reproducible on this commit; classified governed-but-no-change.
tests_added_or_updated: tests/test_blf_01_baseline_gate.py (regression cases covering helper-pinning, runner-pinning, BLF-gate artifact-shape, and BLF-01A authority-shape vocabulary lock-in)
commands_run: python3 -m pytest tests/ -q -k 'authority_leak or contract_impact or github_pr_autofix or roadmap_realization'
guarantees_preserved: no_test_weakening — every previous assertion continues to fire; new regression assertions added.
no_authority_leak — local authority-leak guard remains green on the post-fix changed-file set.
no_schema_bypass — no schemas or examples relaxed; no standards-manifest changes required.
no_roadmap_authority_drift — roadmap mirrors and machine-readable roadmap unchanged.
no_readiness_evidence_bypass — runner authority is now stricter (deterministic interpreter) and acceptance/verification semantics are unchanged. GOV-owned readiness evidence remains untouched.
no_hidden_exceptions — every fix is recorded with rationale; no bypass overrides added.
no_authority_shape_drift — BLF-introduced names use non-owner vocabulary (recommendations, findings, observations, signals, reviewed, validate).
invariants_checked: Test isolation from host signing config (asserted by tests/test_blf_01_baseline_gate.py).
Deterministic pytest interpreter selection in PQX-equivalent execution (asserted by tests/test_blf_01_baseline_gate.py).
BLF-01 artifact completeness and consistency (asserted by scripts/run_blf_01_baseline_gate.py and the gate-shape tests).
broad pytest tier shows no BLF-introduced regression.
Authority-shape preflight reports pass with zero violations on the BLF-01 changed-file set.
known_gaps: Pre-existing forbidden-vocabulary tokens (allow / block / decision / promotion_ready) in spectrum_systems/modules/runtime/github_pr_autofix_review_artifact_validation.py helper functions are out of BLF-01 / BLF-01A scope. They are not currently in the changed-file set. They should be addressed in a dedicated authority-vocabulary cleanup batch.

blf_01a_summary.intent: Clear authority-shape preflight failure on BLF-01 PR without weakening the guard or claiming non-owned authority.

artifacts/blf_01_baseline_failure_fix/fi: renamed to fix_recommendations.json with field renames decisions->recommendations, fix_decision->fix_recommendation
docs/reviews/blf_01_baseline_failure_fix: prose rewrite to drop decision/promotion/certification verbs in BLF voice

blf_01a_summary.behavior_changes: None. Function bodies and assertions are unchanged. validate_realization_dependencies is the same function as the prior enforce_realization_dependencies; REVIEWED_* tuples have the same contents as the prior APPROVED_* tuples; emitted dict keys reviewed/reviewed_prefix carry identical truth values to the prior approved/approved_prefix.
blf_01a_summary.guard_weakening: None. Authority-shape preflight, authority-leak guard, BLF gate, and existing tests remain unchanged in their fail-closed behavior. No allow-list or override entries added.
blf_01a_summary.preflight_result: status=pass, violation_count=0 on the ff1b6bb1..HEAD changed-file set.
